name: equestrian-event-management
description: Equestrian Event Management Platform - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
